options: The PAC PR Guarantee (PRGuar) is implied to be PRMonth (monthly values provided in table, lowest 78.6%), but the Performance Guarantee Term PRGuar is fixed at 81.6% (Section 2.8). Clarification is needed whether the PAC PR Guarantee is the fixed 81.6% or the variable monthly PRMonth targets.

The calculated PRcorrected is rounded up to 1 decimal place of the percentage point. This rounding favors the Contractor/Supplier. It should be confirmed if this rounding applies only to the final comparison PRcorrected value, or if intermediate calculations (like the monthly pro-rata comparison) should also be rounded up.

clarifications.amb_0: Variable monthly depending on the month the test is done
clarifications.term_0: Refers to the overall Contract. Not relevant
clarifications.term_3: Page 14-162 of the file - it's a table which is to be extracted

equations.description: Calculates the actual PAC Performance Ratio measured during the Period of Test.
equations.name: PAC Performance Ratio (PRAct)

variables.description: Actual AC electricity production in kWh measured by the Meter over a set period of time t
variables.name: ENAct

variables.description: STC incident global irradiance on the surface of the PV Module (1000 W/m²)
variables.name: I*

variables.description: Nominal Peak Power of the installation at STC (set out in Item 20 of the EPC contract)
variables.name: PSTC

variables.description: Average incident global irradiance at the surface of the PV Module during period t
variables.name: It

variables.description: Elapsed time between radiation average values (five (5) minutes = 1/12 hour)
variables.name: t

equations.description: Calculates the actual Performance Ratio for Guarantee Year i, incorporating degradation.
equations.formula: PRiAct = (Σi ENAct * I*) / (PSTC * (1 - Di) * Σi [It * t])
equations.name: Interim/DAC Performance Ratio (PRiAct)

variables.description: Actual AC electricity production in kWh measured the Meter over a set period of time t

variables.description: STC incident global irradiance on the surface of the PV Module (1000 W/m²)

variables.description: Average incident global irradiance at the surface of the PV Module during period t

variables.description: Elapsed time between radiation average values (five (5) minutes = 1/12 hour)
variables.name: t

variables.description: Estimated degradation for Guarantee Year i (D1 or D2)
variables.name: Di

equations.description: Applies a temperature correction to the measured PR before comparison against the guaranteed PR.
equations.formula: PRcorrected = PRAct * [1 - ((Σ(HPOA * Tmod,measured) / ΣHPOA) - (Σ(Href * Tmod,ref) / ΣHref)) * Ct]
equations.name: Temperature Correction for PR Comparison

customAnalyses.name: test
customAnalyses.contractFileName: Clare Solar Farm - EPC Contract - Schedule 16.pdf

options: The table only provides values for January through May, but the PR test is 10 consecutive days and comparison is monthly pro-rata. The full 12 months (or the full testing period) of PR_Month values are necessary.

P_STC is defined as Nominal Peak Power in Wp, but the formula uses it as a denominator against kWh (E_NAct) and W/m² (I_t). Standard PR calculation typically uses P_rated or P_DC, not P_STC directly in the denominator unless the formula is simplified or P_STC is meant to represent the rated DC power of the system (Wp).

clarifications.amb_0: Table 1.5 goes over the page and the remainder of the numbers are on the next page
clarifications.amb_1: P_STC is the DC rated power at STC - 127.882 MWdc
clarifications.term_0: Refers to the Contract - not relevant
clarifications.term_3: this is appended to the Schedule that was uploaded

equations.description: Calculates the actual PAC Performance Ratio achieved during the Period of Test, incorporating measured AC energy production and incident irradiance.
equations.name: PAC Performance Ratio (PR_Act)

variables.description: Actual PAC Performance Ratio measured
variables.name: PR_Act

variables.description: Actual AC electricity production in kWh measured by the Meter over a set period of time t
variables.name: E_NAct

variables.description: STC incident global irradiance on the surface of the PV Module
variables.name: I*

variables.description: Nominal Peak Power of the installation at STC (set out in Item 20 of the EPC contract)
variables.name: P_STC

variables.description: Average incident global irradiance at the surface of the PV Module during period t
variables.name: I_t

variables.description: Elapsed time between radiation average values (in hours). In this case it is five (5) minutes = 1/12 hour
variables.name: t

equations.description: Formula used to correct the measured PR for temperature effects when comparing against the monthly Guaranteed PR during Provisional Acceptance.
equations.formula: PR_corrected = PR_Act * [1 - ((Σ(H_POA × T_mod,measured) / ΣH_POA) - (Σ(H_ref × T_mod,ref) / ΣH_ref)) × C_t]
equations.name: Temperature Corrected PR (Provisional Acceptance)

variables.description: Temperature corrected actual monthly PR measured
variables.name: PR_corrected

variables.description: Actual PAC Performance Ratio measured
variables.name: PR_Act

variables.description: Average module temperature measured during production
variables.name: T_mod,measured

variables.description: Average module temperature from the typical meteorological year for the given month during production (refer attachment 01 TMY file)
variables.name: T_mod,ref

variables.description: Negatively defined power temperature coefficient as of the module manufacturer data sheet
variables.name: C_t

variables.description: Instantaneous irradiance on the Plane of the Array
variables.name: H_POA

variables.description: Instantaneous irradiance on the Plane of the Array used in the simulation (refer to attachment 01 TMY file)
variables.name: H_ref

equations.description: Calculates the actual PR achieved during Guarantee Year i, incorporating degradation losses.
equations.formula: PR_Act^i = (Σ_i E_NAct * I*) / (P_STC * (1 - D_i) * Σ_i [I_t * t])
equations.name: Interim/DAC Performance Ratio (PR_Act^i)

variables.description: Actual PR measured for Guarantee Year i
variables.name: PR_Act^i

variables.description: Actual AC electricity production in kWh measured the Meter over a set period of time t
variables.name: E_NAct

variables.description: STC incident global irradiance on the surface of the PV Module
variables.name: I*

variables.description: Nominal Peak Power of the installation at STC
variables.name: P_STC

variables.description: Average incident global irradiance at the surface of the PV Module during period t
variables.name: I_t

variables.description: Elapsed time between radiation average values (in hours). In this case it is five (5) minutes = 1/12 hour
variables.name: t

variables.description: Estimated degradation for Guarantee Year i (D1 or D1+D2)
variables.name: D

equations.description: Formula used to correct the measured PR for temperature effects when comparing against the Guaranteed PR during the Performance Guarantee Term.
equations.formula: PR_corrected^i = PR_Act^i * [1 - ((Σ(H_POA × T_mod,measured) / ΣH_POA) - (Σ(H_ref × T_mod,ref) / ΣH_ref)) × C_t]
equations.name: Temperature Corrected PR (Guarantee Term)
